use_codes.desc: TO INCREASE BLOOD PRESSURE IN ADULTS WITH VASODILATORY SHOCK (E.G., POST-CARDIOTOMY OR SEPSIS) WHO REMAIN HYPOTENSIVE DESPITE FLUIDS AND CATECHOLAMINES
